name: @nasterlabs/codex13-student-dev-kit
description: Windows NSIS installer for Codex 13 Student Dev Kit.

scripts.check:spelling: cspell lint --no-progress README.md AGENTS.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md SECURITY.md SUPPORT.md CITATION.cff codemeta.json .zenodo.json docs/**/*.md packages/**/*.md apps/setup/vendor/README.md apps/setup/src/nsis/i18n/*.nsh apps/setup/src/nsis/pages/terms-pl.rtf apps/setup/src/patches/xampp/root/install/README-xampp-unicode-patch.md .github/**/*.yml Taskfile.yml package.json
